title: GSR_96_E_Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rule, 2010

Short title and commencement.—(1) These rules may be called the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules, 2010. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989 anew column 13 (A)(i) Bank Account Number of the claimant, (ii) Name of the Bank and Branch, (iii) Type of account in Form No. II, Part I] under Rule 5 of Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989 shall be inserted. [F. No. 2007/TC (RCTY/1-6] SUNIL KUMAR, Adviser, Public Grievances Foot Note:—The principal rules were published vide num- ber G.S.R. 842(E), dated the 19-9-1989 and subsequently amended by G.S.R. 700(E), dated 26-11-1991, G.S.R. 438 (E), dated 21-4-1992, G.S.R. 509(E), dated 15-6-1994, G.S.R. 27E), dated 4-7-1996, G.S.R. 59(E), dated 4-2-1997,G.S.R.71KE), dated 15-10-1999, G.S.R.167(E), dated 29-2-2000, G.S.R. . 513(E), dated 9-7-2001, G.S.R. 787(E), dated 2-12-2002, G.S.R. 384, dated 22-10-2003 and G.S.R. 66(E), dated 15-2-2006.
